title: [ImportVerilog] Incorporate block names into signal/instance names

features.name: named begin block for hierarchical scoping
features.description: Code should include a named begin block that establishes a hierarchical scope for declarations

features.name: variable declaration inside named begin block
features.description: Code should include a variable declared within a named begin block to test hierarchical name generation

features.name: genvar for loop inside named begin block
features.description: Code should include a genvar for loop inside a named begin block to generate multiple instances

features.name: nested named begin blocks with generate loop
features.description: Code should include nested named begin blocks where the inner block is inside a genvar for loop, creating hierarchical signal paths
